summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Employee Onboarding Flow, Tickets, and Audit Logs features. All 8 requested features tested and verified working correctly.

admin_login_and_verification_access.description: Admin login works with admin/admin credentials. Verification page accessible via sidebar navigation.

admin_onboarding_stats_cards.description: Verification page displays 4 stat cards: Total Employees (2), Pending Verifications (0), Rejected Documents (0), Completed (0)

admin_pending_employees_queue.description: Onboarding Queue table displays employees with pending onboarding (2 employees: Onboard Test User EMP0054, New Test Employee EMP0053)

employee_login_redirects_to_onboarding.description: Employee 'onboardtest' login redirects to /employee/onboarding page when onboarding_status is not approved

onboarding_page_document_types.description: Onboarding page shows all 7 required document types: ID Proof, Address Proof, PAN Card, Education Certificates, Experience Letters, Bank Account Details, Passport Size Photo

tickets_page_loads.description: Tickets page loads correctly with 4 stat cards (Total, Open, In Progress, Resolved), Support Tickets table, and New Ticket button

audit_logs_page_loads.description: Audit Logs page displays Activity Log table with 500+ records, 4 stat cards (Total Logs, Logins Today, Changes Today, Onboarding Actions), and resource filter

navigation_sidebar_new_items.description: Sidebar includes Verification, Tickets, and Audit Logs navigation items

seed_data_creation: Created 2 test tickets during backend testing (TEST_Onboarding Issue, TEST_Status Update Ticket)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Employee onboarding flow fully implemented. Backend APIs (/api/onboarding/*, /api/tickets, /api/audit-logs) all working. Frontend pages (Verification, Tickets, AuditLogs, EmployeeOnboarding) all rendering correctly. Employee 'onboardtest' (EMP0054) exists and redirects to onboarding page. Admin can access Verification page to see onboarding queue. Tickets and Audit Logs pages accessible to admin users.

backend_tests_summary.TestOnboardingStats: GET /api/onboarding/stats returns total_employees, pending, in_progress, under_review, approved, rejected, completion_rate
backend_tests_summary.TestOnboardingList: GET /api/onboarding/list returns onboarding queue with filters
backend_tests_summary.TestTickets: CRUD operations work - create, get, update status
backend_tests_summary.TestAuditLogs: GET /api/audit-logs returns activity logs with resource filter
backend_tests_summary.TestEmployeeOnboardingLogin: Employee login returns onboarding_status and onboarding_completed flags
backend_tests_summary.TestOnboardingEmployeeDetails: GET /api/onboarding/employee/{id} returns onboarding record and documents
